prompt: I want an agent-operable runbook for moving my dash.deno.com project to console.deno.com. Use the repo wizard as the checklist, but adapt it to my app source and include verification evidence.
assertions: Uses deno-deploy-classic-migration-wizard.sh as the local checklist or explicitly references the local wizard.
Maps work to the official migration guide stages such as env vars, domains, HTTP API, cron, queues, and KV.
Includes a verification section with commands run or commands that should be run.
Clearly marks dashboard-only work separately from agent-editable repository work.
